title: Make RnS active-session resume aware
description: Learn from the 2026-07-14 Mira scheduled RnS failure: the systemd timer fired but hcom r failed because hcom still considered the session active. Update RnS behavior so a resume nudge that encounters an already-active/listening session delivers the RnS prompt via hcom send instead of failing silently or requiring manual intervention.
acceptance_criteria: RnS send_nudge detects the hcom 'still active' resume failure and falls back to sending the RnS prompt to the active session.
The fallback preserves visible-terminal resume behavior for stopped sessions and does not use headless mode.
Tests cover normal resume success, active-session fallback success, and active-session fallback failure.
Focused limit watcher tests, validate_events --fail-on-new, validate_task_mirrors, and full MAP tests pass.
